title: T-086 — UI: ComplianceDocsScreen + DocUploadModal (ComplianceDocsScreen prototype) (NPD-i)
prompt:
# T-086 — Compliance docs UI

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §19 + UX 01-NPD-UX.md compliance_docs + doc_upload_modal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/npd/docs-screens.jsx:6-53 (ComplianceDocsScreen) + design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:667-689 (DocUploadModal)

## Goal
Client component ComplianceDocsScreen at /(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs listing docs grouped by doc_type with expiry badges + DocUploadModal for upload (drag-and-drop + click-to-pick + MIME/size client validation + version_number bump).

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/page.tsx (RSC) reads listDocs.
2. ComplianceDocsScreen renders shadcn Table grouped by doc_type with cols Title/Version/Uploaded/Expires/Status badge/Actions; status badges: 'Valid' (green), 'Expiring' (amber if ≤30d), 'Expired' (red); signed-URL Download button calls getSignedUrl.
3. DocUploadModal — shadcn Dialog + RHF + zodResolver — fields doc_type Select, title Input, file Input (accept=.pdf,.xlsx,.docx, MAX 20 MB client check), expires_at DatePicker, mitigation; calls uploadDoc.
4. RTL parity test against prototype + client validation.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_components/compliance-docs-screen.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_components/doc-upload-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/fa/[productCode]/docs/_components/__tests__/compliance-docs.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/docs-screens.jsx [ref]
- design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production ComplianceDocsScreen renders, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/npd/docs-screens.jsx:6-53 (ComplianceDocsScreen), then it has the same per-doc_type grouping + Title/Version/Uploaded/Expires/Status columns + status badges (Valid/Expiring/Expired) using shadcn Table + Badge primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given DocUploadModal renders (design/Monopilot Design System/npd/modals.jsx:667-689 DocUploadModal), then it has shadcn Dialog + Form + Select (doc_type) + Input (title, file accept=PDF/XLSX/DOCX) + DatePicker (expires_at) using RHF + zodResolver — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
3. Given the user picks a 25 MB file, when blur or submit fires, then a Zod inline error appears and uploadDoc is NOT called per §19 client size validation

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/compliance-docs.test.tsx asserting parity + client size validation before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test compliance-docs'

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not skip client-side MIME and size validation
- Do not bypass shadcn Table primitives
